externalAgentRole: structural edits in unpacked package files
notes: The document is authored as a browser-readable HTMLX source.
Figures are grouped objects with package-local PNG icons.
The OpenWebDoc app is for small text, typography, image, shape, table, and figure corrections.
Large rewrites, new figures, new tables, and layout redesigns belong in unpacked package files.
The readable index.html is the primary artifact.
The opening composition introduces reader benefits before technical identifiers.
Package CSS uses fixed column counts and document-width typography so text, tables, figures, and spacing preserve visual proportions when viewport width changes.
